global.message: Welcome to Lap Counter 2.0! Enjoy dynamic MET-based calorie burn tracking, POI map searches, and personal best records.

freeTier.message: Unlock Premium today to access unlimited laps, live GPS maps, and advanced cadence analytics!

premiumMonthly.message: Thank you for supporting us on the Monthly plan! Check out our new outdoor run metrics.

premiumAnnual.message: Welcome to the Annual family! You have full unlimited access to all features.
